'''Tebbi''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Lepi/Legends|Lepi]] with soft white fur and pink-tipped [[Ear/Legends|ears]]. She was the daughter of [[Heff (Lepi)|Heff]], one of only three surviving members of the original [[Colony ship/Legends|colony ships]] to settle [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] in the early [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Tebbi was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] sympathizer, and when her father was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jodo Kast]], who was [[Escape from Tatooine|hunting]] [[Adar Tallon/Legends|Adar Tallon]], she shared what she knew with a group of Rebel agents who were also seeking Tallon.<ref name="TM" />

A couple of seasons later, Tebbi sold her father's shop, [[Heff's Souvenirs]], to the [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Moplin Jarron]].<ref name="GG7">''[[Galaxy Guide 7: Mos Eisley]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Tebbi was described in ''[[Tatooine Manhunt]]'' as a "rabbit-like alien". The name "Heff" was later used in the ''[[The Starhoppers of Aduba-3]]'' article as an example of a Lepi name, establishing him and his daughter as Lepi.
